name: make all
purpose: Authoritative full confidence ladder: clean-all → preflight → quality → env-validate-all → env-drift-check → stage dev/test/staging/prod → evidence → env-status. Sonar gate runs once at test stage.

name: make all-promote
purpose: Run the full promote ladder AND verify it (same honest result as make all).

name: make _all-promote-internal
purpose: Internal: run the stage ladder (dev/test/staging/prod) with LADDER_CONTINUE_ON_DEGRADED=1; no verification. Called by make all and all-promote.

name: make release-confidence
purpose: Discoverable alias for make all (the authoritative full-confidence run incl. Sonar gate). Does NOT re-scan.

name: make full
purpose: Alias for all.

name: make promote
purpose: Run the confidence ladder dev → test → staging → prod (no preflight, no evidence verify).

name: make clean
purpose: Stop app services for ENV, kill stale processes, remove artefacts.

name: make clean-all
purpose: Stop dev and test environments (staging/prod managed manually).

name: make compose-up
purpose: Start default services for ENV (thin wrapper of up.sh).

name: make compose-up-default
purpose: Start exactly the 6 default services (postgres redis clickhouse minio mailpit otel-collector).

name: make compose-up-observability
purpose: Start Loki + Tempo + Grafana + Alloy (observability profile).

name: make compose-up-identity
purpose: Start Keycloak (identity profile).

name: make compose-up-secrets
purpose: Start OpenBao central secrets manager (secrets profile, dev mode).

name: make compose-up-search-provider
purpose: Start Meilisearch composed search provider (ADR-0071).

name: make compose-up-observability-provider
purpose: Start Prometheus + Tempo + Alertmanager (ADR-0071).

name: make compose-up-cloud
purpose: Start LocalStack (cloud-mocks profile).

name: make compose-up-external-mocks
purpose: Start WireMock (external-mocks profile).

name: make compose-up-identity-mocks
purpose: Start mock-oidc upstream IdP fixture (identity-mocks profile; dev/test).

name: make compose-up-web
purpose: Build and start the web profile (Caddy SPA + platform-api) for test/staging/prod. Hard-fails for ENV=dev.

name: make seed-idps
purpose: Register mock broker IdPs (mock-google/azure/apple) on the ENV realm (idempotent).

name: make compose-down
purpose: Stop all running compose services for ENV.

name: make compose-down-web
purpose: Stop web profile containers for ENV.

name: make compose-down-volumes
purpose: Stop services and remove ALL named volumes for ENV (destructive).

name: make compose-down-reset
purpose: Stop services and reset app data; preserves Keycloak volume by default (PRESERVE_JVM_VOLUMES).

name: make compose-ps
purpose: Show compose service status for ENV.

name: make compose-logs
purpose: Follow compose logs for ENV.

name: make external-caddy-up
purpose: Start external Caddy on host port 80 (Cloudflare-facing routing).

name: make external-caddy-down
purpose: Stop external Caddy (react-shared project).

name: make sentry-up
purpose: Start shared Sentry instance (external-sentry profile, react-shared). Idempotent.

name: make sentry-down
purpose: Stop shared Sentry instance.

name: make identity-mocks-down
purpose: Stop this env's mock-oidc fixture only (rm -sf, never down).
safetyControls: rm -sf scoped to mock-oidc, never project down

name: make sonar-up
purpose: Start shared SonarQube (external-sonar profile, react-sonar). Idempotent.

name: make sonar-provision
purpose: Ensure a valid SonarQube analysis token + OIDC exist (idempotent).

name: make sonar-down
purpose: Stop shared SonarQube instance.

name: make dev-up
purpose: Start the dev environment using Tilt only.

name: make test-up
purpose: Full test stack: default + identity + keycloak-provision + external-mocks + observability + web.

name: make staging-up
purpose: Full staging stack: all profiles + web.

name: make prod-up
purpose: Full production-like stack: all profiles + web.

name: make dev-down
purpose: Stop dev environment (Tilt).

name: make test-down
purpose: Stop test stack.

name: make staging-down
purpose: Stop staging stack.

name: make prod-down
purpose: Stop prod stack.

name: make reset-local
purpose: Reset local Postgres to clean migrated+seeded state (destructive).

name: make seed-demo
purpose: Seed fixture data into local Postgres (idempotent).

name: make db-migrate
purpose: Run database migrations (idempotent, forward-only).

name: make db-shell
purpose: Open a psql shell to ENV's Compose Postgres.

name: make db-backup
purpose: Dump ENV's Postgres to .local-artifacts/backups (local-only, ADR-ACT-0229).

name: make db-restore
purpose: GUARDED restore (ENV=dev|test + CONFIRM_RESTORE token + BACKUP_FILE). Destructive.

name: make redis-flush-local
purpose: Flush all keys from ENV's Compose Redis.

name: make keycloak-provision
purpose: Apply Terraform to provision the platform Keycloak realm for ENV. Secrets via TF_VAR_*.

name: make env-generate-runtime
purpose: Generate the runtime env artifact (.env/$(ENV).env) from the manifest (ADR-0072).

name: make env-generate-runtime-all
purpose: Generate runtime env artifacts for every stage.

name: make env-validate-all
purpose: Validate all environment manifests + generated runtime env (subsumes legacy check-env-files).

name: make env-drift-check
purpose: Re-assert stage-policy conformance against the manifests (subsumes legacy check-env-drift).

name: make env-init
purpose: Generate runtime env + project the manifest into the environment registry.

name: make env-seed-secrets
purpose: Seed OpenBao with the environment's secret keys (honest skip if OpenBao down).

name: make env-seed-providers
purpose: Seed provider_configs from the manifest seededProviderDefaults.

name: make env-seed-config
purpose: Seed environment-level managed config (registry projection; narrow first slice).

name: make env-seed-admin
purpose: Generate the per-environment global system administrator handoff.

name: make env-print-admin
purpose: Re-print the per-environment admin login handoff (authorised local command).

name: make env-rotate-secret
purpose: Rotate one managed secret (ENV + KEY) + regenerate runtime env.

name: make env-provider-up
purpose: Start one allowed provider profile (ENV + PROVIDER).

name: make env-provider-reconcile
purpose: Re-probe a provider's readiness + mark the environment reconciled.

name: make env-reconcile
purpose: Re-sync the manifest + mark the environment reconciled.

name: make env-bootstrap-seed
purpose: Idempotent post-migration seed: registry + providers + config + admin (each step degrades honestly).

name: make env-bootstrap
purpose: Full per-environment bootstrap: runtime env → migrate → init → seed → admin.

name: make evidence
purpose: Aggregate all stage evidence into docs/evidence/stages/summary.json + verify the ladder.

name: make help
purpose: Show all documented targets.

name: make infra-check
purpose: Validate Terraform/OpenTofu syntax, format, init, validate (no cloud creds).

name: make readmes
purpose: Regenerate all package READMEs from metadata.

name: make generate
purpose: Regenerate READMEs + inventory + lifecycle reports (orchestrator all --strict).

name: make pre-slice-gate
purpose: Required gate before ADR-ACT-0008 first vertical slice (full quality + tests + Sonar).

name: make local-substrate-check
purpose: Local developer quick-check (NOT sufficient to begin ADR-ACT-0008; no Sonar).

name: make test
purpose: Run all tests with V8 LCOV coverage (test:coverage).

name: make test-compose
purpose: Compose service smoke tests (starts default services if needed).

name: make audit
purpose: npm audit (high/critical) + OSV vulnerability scan.

name: make security
purpose: Secret scan via gitleaks.
failureSemantics: exit-nonzero on secret (skips if gitleaks missing)

name: make compose
purpose: Validate compose.yaml syntax across all profiles (no services started).

name: make architecture
purpose: Full architecture governance suite (orchestrator --strict + codegen check + frontend conventions + openapi drift).

name: make semgrep
purpose: ERROR-severity constraint rules (hard gate; skips with warning if semgrep missing locally).
failureSemantics: exit-nonzero on ERROR finding (skip if binary absent)

name: make sonar
purpose: SonarQube scan + absolute-zero quality gate against the shared instance (auto-provisions token).

name: make advisory
purpose: Report-only gates (knip + depcruise); never fail make all.

name: make sbom
purpose: Generate CycloneDX 1.6 SBOM.

name: make license
purpose: Show license policy status (fails on blocked licenses).

name: make quality
purpose: Full quality gate: install format lint typecheck audit security compose architecture semgrep license advisory.

name: make check
purpose: Fast local gate: format lint typecheck audit compose architecture semgrep (no Sonar, no compose smoke).

name: make ci
purpose: CI-safe subset: install format lint typecheck test audit security compose architecture semgrep.

name: make preflight
purpose: Check binaries, Docker, env manifests, port conflicts, hosts. Generates runtime env artifacts.

name: make stage-dev
purpose: Dev stage: Tilt executor, destructive data, minimal-smoke + unit + e2e-internal.

name: make stage-test
purpose: Test stage: Compose executor, destructive data, full tests + Sonar gate + E2E smoke.

name: make stage-staging
purpose: Staging stage: Compose HA, preserve data, integration + compose-smoke + external-smoke.

name: make stage-prod
purpose: Prod stage: Compose HA, preserve data, external-smoke + auth-e2e + production E2E.
safetyControls: auth-e2e FAILED CONFIDENCE without real creds

name: make env-up-all
purpose: Start all four isolated environments and leave them running.

name: make env-down-all
purpose: Stop all four environments.

name: make env-status
purpose: Show container health for all four environments.

name: make e2e-accessibility
purpose: axe-core WCAG 2.1 A/AA across safe routes x a11y profiles + structural contract.

name: make e2e-persona-authz
purpose: Persona authorization permutation: forbidden routes/APIs denied, expected allowed.

name: make e2e-persona-matrix
purpose: Multi-persona authed crawl asserting full registry matrix + clickthrough allow/deny.

name: make e2e-failure-rootcause
purpose: Failure-path/root-cause + Grafana-Loki validation; honest DEGRADED when Loki/app unreachable.
failureSemantics: DEGRADED when unreachable; FAILED when no root-cause log

name: make e2e-sentry-assertion
purpose: Self-hosted Sentry API event assertion; honest DEGRADED when Sentry API unconfigured.
failureSemantics: DEGRADED when unreachable; FAILED when event missing

name: make e2e-clickability
purpose: Dynamic clickability crawler by accessible ROLE; quality-gates each page + diffs UI contract.

name: make e2e-observability-correlation
purpose: Prove each E2E scenario is findable in logs/Tempo by testRunId/scenarioId.
failureSemantics: DEGRADED when unreachable; FAILED when zero correlatable lines

name: make e2e-coverage-validate
purpose: Stage-aware E2E coverage gate (registry validation, no running stack required).
failureSemantics: fails make all on coverage gap

name: make e2e-external-smoke
purpose: External smoke tests against a running stack (no auth).

name: make e2e-external-auth
purpose: External auth E2E against real Keycloak; FAILS (not skips) without creds.
safetyControls: E2E_AUTH_OPTIONAL=1 only permits manual skip; stage policy never sets it

name: make e2e-external
purpose: Full external E2E against PROD_BASE_URL (default http://aldous.info).

name: make dev-e2e
purpose: Run E2E smoke tests against dev environment.

name: make dev-e2e-auth
purpose: Run auth E2E against dev (requires Keycloak).

name: make test-e2e
purpose: Run E2E smoke tests against test environment.

name: make staging-e2e
purpose: Run E2E smoke tests against staging (localhost:82).

name: make prod-e2e
purpose: Run E2E smoke tests against prod-like (localhost:83).

name: make run-stage-e2e
purpose: Run E2E smoke tests against the active environment (WEB_HTTP_PORT-derived URL).

name: make run-stage-tests
purpose: Run the standard unit/integration suite against the active environment (selection by fixture/NODE_ENV).

name: make e2e-internal
purpose: Internal E2E: fixture session against Vite dev server (auto-starts api + Vite).

name: make e2e-internal-build
purpose: Internal build E2E: fixture session against the production bundle.

name: make test-real-auth
purpose: Real Keycloak auth E2E; fails fast if prerequisites missing.

name: make install
purpose: Install all npm dependencies (root + governance tools).

name: make format
purpose: Write Prettier formatting then verify.

name: make lint
purpose: Markdown lint + ESLint flat config.

name: make typecheck
purpose: TypeScript strict (app + all platform packages).

name: make fix
purpose: Auto-fix all Prettier formatting issues.

name: npm format:check
purpose: Prettier --check (verify formatting).

name: npm format:write
purpose: Prettier --write (rewrite formatting).

name: npm lint:md
purpose: markdownlint-cli2 over all markdown.

name: npm lint
purpose: ESLint over the repo.

name: npm knip
purpose: Unused-export/dependency report (advisory).

name: npm depcruise
purpose: dependency-cruiser import-graph report (advisory).

name: npm audit:deps
purpose: npm audit high/critical, production deps.

name: npm audit:osv
purpose: OSV vulnerability scan (recursive).

name: npm secrets:scan
purpose: gitleaks secret scan (skips with notice if gitleaks absent).

name: npm coverage:normalize
purpose: Normalize lcov coverage paths for Sonar.

name: npm sbom:generate
purpose: Generate CycloneDX SBOM JSON.

name: npm compose:config
purpose: docker compose config (default profile validate).

name: npm compose:up
purpose: docker compose up -d (current dir, no env scoping).

name: npm compose:down
purpose: docker compose down.

name: npm compose:logs
purpose: docker compose logs -f.

name: npm compose:ps
purpose: docker compose ps.

name: npm compose:identity
purpose: docker compose up Keycloak (identity profile).

name: npm compose:cloud
purpose: docker compose up LocalStack (cloud-mocks profile).

name: npm compose:sentry
purpose: docker compose up Sentry (external-sentry profile).

name: npm compose:external-mocks
purpose: docker compose up WireMock (external-mocks profile).

name: npm tsc:check
purpose: tsc --noEmit app + api + packages.

name: npm tsc:check:api
purpose: tsc --noEmit platform-api.

name: npm tsc:check:packages
purpose: tsc --noEmit all packages.

name: npm test:compose
purpose: Compose service smoke integration test.

name: npm license:policy
purpose: license-checker: fail on blocked licenses.

name: npm compose:config:all
purpose: docker compose config across ALL profiles.

name: npm openapi:drift
purpose: OpenAPI drift validation (non-strict).

name: npm frontend:conventions
purpose: Validate frontend conventions.

name: npm usf:validate
purpose: Validate Universal Service Foundation registry/matrix.

name: npm usf:render
purpose: Render USF generated tables.

name: npm codegen
purpose: GraphQL codegen (graphql-codegen --config codegen.ts).

name: npm generate:feature
purpose: Scaffold a new feature slice (generator).

name: npm codegen:check
purpose: Run codegen then git diff --exit-code (drift gate).

name: npm compose:up:default
purpose: docker compose up the 6 default services.

name: npm compose:down:volumes
purpose: docker compose down --volumes (destructive).

name: npm test:architecture
purpose: Run the full architecture + governance node:test suite.

name: npm test:coverage
purpose: Run the full node:test suite with experimental coverage → lcov.

name: npm test:frontend
purpose: Vitest watch (frontend).

name: npm test:frontend:coverage
purpose: Vitest with coverage (frontend).

name: npm test:frontend:run
purpose: Vitest run once (frontend).

name: npm db:migrate
purpose: Apply Postgres migrations (forward-only).

name: npm db:seed
purpose: Seed fixture data into Postgres.

name: npm seed:idps
purpose: Seed broker IdPs onto the realm.

name: npm proof:auth-settings
purpose: Runtime proof harness for auth settings (live-proof; honest skip/degrade when backend unreachable).
failureSemantics: exit-nonzero on proof failure; honest skip when backend down

name: npm proof:auth-idps
purpose: Runtime proof harness for auth idps (live-proof; honest skip/degrade when backend unreachable).
failureSemantics: exit-nonzero on proof failure; honest skip when backend down

name: npm proof:auth-credential-lifecycle
purpose: Runtime proof harness for auth credential lifecycle (live-proof; honest skip/degrade when backend unreachable).
failureSemantics: exit-nonzero on proof failure; honest skip when backend down

name: npm test:mock-oidc
purpose: Install + run the mock-oidc service test suite.

name: npm db:reset
purpose: Drop + recreate the database schema (NODE_ENV=test).

name: npm test:platform-api
purpose: Full platform-api node:test suite (~254 tests, needs Postgres/Redis).

name: npm test:platform-api:unit-safe
purpose: Unit-safe platform-api subset (~206 tests, no fixture-org).

name: npm api:start
purpose: Start platform-api HTTP server.

name: npm api:start:admin
purpose: Start platform-api with tenant-admin fixture session.

name: npm api:start:viewer
purpose: Start platform-api with viewer fixture session.

name: npm test:e2e
purpose: Playwright internal E2E config.

name: npm test:e2e:ui
purpose: Playwright UI mode (interactive).

name: npm test:e2e:report
purpose: Show the last Playwright HTML report.

name: npm test:e2e:build
purpose: Playwright build (production-bundle) E2E config.

name: npm test:e2e:internal
purpose: Playwright internal E2E config.

name: npm test:e2e:external
purpose: Playwright external E2E config.

name: npm test:e2e:identity
purpose: Playwright identity E2E config.

name: npm test:e2e:prod
purpose: Playwright prod E2E config (live smoke).

name: npm e2e:coverage:validate
purpose: Validate E2E coverage registry.

name: npm e2e:personas:validate
purpose: Validate E2E persona registry.

name: npm e2e:ui:contract:validate
purpose: Validate E2E UI contract registry.

name: npm e2e:registry:validate
purpose: Validate all E2E registries (coverage+personas+ui-contract).

name: npm e2e:scenario:validate
purpose: Validate the E2E scenario manifest.

name: npm e2e:observability:correlate
purpose: Run observability correlation tool.

name: npm e2e:ui:discover
purpose: Playwright discovery config (clickability crawl).

name: npm e2e:failure:rootcause
purpose: Run failure-rootcause tool.

name: npm e2e:sentry:assert
purpose: Run Sentry assertion tool.

name: npm e2e:accessibility
purpose: Playwright accessibility spec.

name: npm e2e:persona:authz
purpose: Playwright persona-authz spec.

name: npm validate:slices
purpose: Validate slice readiness.

name: npm build:spa
purpose: Vite production build of the SPA.

name: npm semgrep
purpose: Semgrep scan (constraint rules, all severities).

name: npm semgrep:json
purpose: Semgrep scan with JSON output.

name: npm semgrep:gate
purpose: Semgrep ERROR-severity gate (--error).

name: npm openapi:lint
purpose: Spectral lint of docs/api/openapi.json.

name: npm codeql:db
purpose: Create a CodeQL database for JS/TS.

name: npm codeql:analyze
purpose: Analyze the CodeQL database → SARIF.

name: npm codeql
purpose: CodeQL db + analyze.

name: npm mcp:governor
purpose: Run the platform-governor MCP server.

name: npm mcp:governor:selftest
purpose: platform-governor MCP handshake selftest.

name: scripts/backup/postgres-backup.sh
purpose: Dump ENV Postgres to .local-artifacts/backups.

name: scripts/backup/postgres-restore.sh
purpose: Guarded restore of a Postgres backup.

name: scripts/clean/clean-env.sh
purpose: Stop services + kill stale processes + remove artefacts for ENV.

name: scripts/clean/assert-clean.sh
purpose: Assert ENV is clean (post-condition for clean).

name: scripts/compose/up.sh
purpose: Bring up a compose profile for ENV (env-scoped wrapper).

name: scripts/compose/down.sh
purpose: Bring down a compose profile for ENV.

name: scripts/compose/wait.sh
purpose: Wait for ENV services to become healthy (timeout).

name: scripts/env/bootstrap.mjs
purpose: Env bootstrap CLI: seed-secrets / seed-admin / print-admin / rotate-secret.

name: scripts/env/generate-runtime-env.mjs
purpose: Generate .env/<stage>.env from config/environments/<stage>.json (ADR-0072).

name: scripts/env/validate-manifests.mjs
purpose: Validate environment manifests + stage-policy conformance.

name: scripts/env/resolve-env-file.sh
purpose: Resolve/materialise the runtime env file for a stage.

name: scripts/env/lib/manifests.mjs
purpose: Shared manifest-loading library (used by env scripts).

name: scripts/keycloak/provision-bff-authz.sh
purpose: Provision BFF authorization (UMA resource server) on the realm.

name: scripts/preflight/check-binaries.sh
purpose: Check required binaries present.

name: scripts/preflight/check-docker.sh
purpose: Check Docker availability.

name: scripts/preflight/check-port-conflicts.mjs
purpose: Check for port conflicts across stages.

name: scripts/preflight/check-hosts.mjs
purpose: Check /etc/hosts entries for tenant FQDNs.

name: scripts/preflight/check-clean-state.mjs
purpose: Check clean state (not wired into preflight; see note).

name: scripts/sentry/ensure-relay-credentials.sh
purpose: Ensure Sentry relay credentials exist.

name: scripts/sentry/provision-sentry.sh
purpose: Provision the Sentry project/org for the shared instance.

name: scripts/smoke/sentry-smoke.sh
purpose: Smoke-check Sentry reachability.

name: scripts/smoke/compose-smoke.sh
purpose: Smoke-check compose services.

name: scripts/smoke/http-smoke.sh
purpose: HTTP smoke check of an endpoint.

name: scripts/smoke/loki-smoke.sh
purpose: Smoke-check Loki reachability.

name: scripts/smoke/observability-smoke.sh
purpose: Smoke-check the observability stack.

name: scripts/sonar/ensure-quality-gate.sh
purpose: Ensure the ADR-0016 Governance Tooling quality gate exists + assigned.

name: scripts/sonar/provision-token.sh
purpose: Auto-generate a SonarQube analysis token.

name: scripts/sonar/provision-oidc.sh
purpose: Provision SonarQube OIDC.

name: scripts/stages/run-stage.sh
purpose: Run one stage of the confidence ladder per stage-policy.yaml (the stage engine).

name: scripts/stages/stage-exit.sh
purpose: Map stage result to exit code (FULL/DEGRADED/FAILED).

name: scripts/evidence/verify-ladder.mjs
purpose: Verify the four-stage ladder passed in order at HEAD; fails make all otherwise.

name: scripts/evidence/write-stage-evidence.mjs
purpose: Write a stage evidence JSON file.

name: scripts/tests/aggregate-confidence.sh
purpose: Aggregate stage confidence results.

name: scripts/tests/run-env-tests.sh
purpose: Run the env-scoped test suite (helper used by stages).

name: scripts/tilt/up-dev.sh
purpose: Start the Tilt dev stack (blocks until healthy).

name: scripts/tilt/down-dev.sh
purpose: Stop the Tilt dev stack.

name: npm v2:readiness
purpose: Run the read-only V2-readiness validator (semantic closure + branch-cut blockers).
postAudit: ADR-ACT-0292 (added after audited commit; carried into V2)

name: npm v2:readiness:json
purpose: V2-readiness validator, machine-readable JSON report.
postAudit: ADR-ACT-0292 (added after audited commit; carried into V2)

name: npm proof:typed-secret-resolution
purpose: Live two-tier secret-resolution proof (bootstrap→store→resolve→rotate; redacted).
sideEffects: creates+deletes a throwaway org + test secret
failureSemantics: exit-nonzero on failure; SKIP exit 0 if Postgres unavailable

name: npm ui:harness
purpose: Run the Semantic Reference Harness dev server (vite).

name: npm ui:harness:test
purpose: node --test: harness definition validator + controller + live-model consistency.

name: npm ui:harness:e2e
purpose: Playwright headless journeys proving harness capability semantics.

name: npm proof:ui-semantic-groups
purpose: Headless journey proving tenant groups UI semantics (V1C-01).

name: npm proof:ui-semantic-sub-organisations
purpose: Headless journey proving sub-organisations (flat list) UI semantics (V1C-02).

name: npm proof:ui-semantic-claim-mapping
purpose: Headless journey proving IdP claim-mapping admin UI semantics (V1C-06).

name: npm codeql:validate
purpose: Validate CodeQL setup (graceful skip when codeql not installed).
failureSemantics: skips with notice if codeql absent

name: npm sbom:verify
purpose: Verify SBOM presence, format, and freshness (CycloneDX 1.6).

name: npm sbom:policy
purpose: Check SBOM for flagged licenses (GPL/AGPL/SSPL/Commons/BUSL).

name: npm proof:metrics-prometheus
purpose: Runtime proof harness for Prometheus application metrics (V1C-17a).
failureSemantics: exit-nonzero on proof failure; honest degrade when backend down

name: npm proof:dashboards
purpose: Runtime proof harness for Grafana dashboard provisioning (V1C-17b).
failureSemantics: exit-nonzero on proof failure; honest degrade when backend down
